content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 31, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 31, 2026, focused on hardening the Eliza Cloud infrastructure, improving agent security, and stabilizing the desktop and CI environments. Key achievements include enabling metered billing for hosted agents, implementing mandatory confirmation for sensitive actions, and resolving critical boot issues in CI container images.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Metering**
*   Enabled signed webhook emission for credit and inference events to support metered billing for hosted waifu agents ([#8094](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8094)).
*   Integrated per-inference spend tracking into the waifu burn meter ([#8089](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8089)).
*   Updated provisioned agents to run within their own containers, routing traffic via the sandbox registry instead of in-process ([#8073](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8073)).

**Security & Stability Hardening**
*   Implemented `requireConfirmation` for sensitive actions across multiple plugins (wallet, LifeOps, GitHub, etc.) and hardened MCP spawn and webhook interfaces ([#8076](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8076)).
*   Resolved CI agent image boot failures by fixing runtime dependency resolution and adding automated boot verification ([#8079](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8079), [#8081](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8081)).
*   Improved desktop build robustness and added whitelabel branding support ([#8074](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8074)).

**Orchestrator & Core Logic**
*   Advanced the `/orchestrator` workbench with capability parity and startup robustness fixes ([#8066](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8066)).
*   Refined message handling logic to prioritize complete direct replies and preserve original replies during regeneration ([#8071](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8071), [#8045](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8045)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8093](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8093): Fixes startup polling cancellation.
*   [#8090](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8090): Enables Cerebras BYOK support.
*   [#8088](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8088): Repairs client-side UI tests.
*   [#8086](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8086): Graceful degradation for web search without API keys.
*   [#8085](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8085): Allows read-only webfetch in orchestrator spawn config.
*   [#8084](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8084): Fixes tsx loader path and docker tagging.
*   [#8083](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8083): Hardens agent image boot gate.
*   [#8078](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8078), [#8077](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8077): Fixes for CI agent image dependencies.
*   [#8070](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8070): Returns web UI URL from provisioning.
*   [#8069](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8069): Adds systemd bundle for Linux deployment.
*   [#8068](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8068): Updates electrobun submodule.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES

**Build & Configuration Challenges**
*   [#8099](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8099): Build failures in `develop` branch following the `requireConfirmation` rollout due to type mismatches in GitHub action results.
*   [#8100](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8100): Lack of inline live-info capability for non-Anthropic models (e.g., Cerebras/gpt-oss) when API keys are missing.

**Diagnostic Limitations**
*   [#8101](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8101): JSON-RPC error data is being discarded, making it difficult to diagnose 'Invalid params' failures in spawned sub-agents.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported.*
